# java-fixture-project

Copied from the Node cvetrace repo's fixture of the same name, for parity: pins
`org.apache.logging.log4j:log4j-core@2.14.1` via a `${log4j.version}` property (also
exercises property resolution), affected by
[GHSA-jfh8-c2jp-5v3q](https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jfh8-c2jp-5v3q) /
[CVE-2021-44228](https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2021-44228) -- "Log4Shell".
